channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Pro-government group backs Tinubu’s reforms, pledges support for 2027 election
item.description: A pro-government group, the Global Alliance for Tinubu Campaign, don urge Nigerians to continue supporting President Bola Ahmed Tinubu reforms as e dey push for him re-election in 2027. According to t...

item.title: Laxmi Verma, BJP's Candidate, Nominated to Rajya Sabha from Chhattisgarh
item.description: In a recent development, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has nominated Laxmi Verma, a prominent leader from Chhattisgarh, to the Rajya Sabha. The nomination highlights BJP's continued focus on streng...

item.title: Australian Government Urges Stranded Citizens in Middle East to Use Commercial Flights for Return Amid Regional Conflict
item.description: The Australian government has sent six crisis response teams to the Middle East to assist with an overwhelming number of stranded Australians due to the escalating conflict spreading across the region...

item.title: Court denies bail to three Kenyans facing US extradition over fraud scheme
item.description: A Nairobi court has ordered three Kenyan nationals—Peter Omari, Francis Asanyo, and Elvis Obaigwa—to remain in custody at Kileleshwa Police Station for 14 days as extradition proceedings to the United...

item.title: Abhishek Banerjee Emerges as TMC’s Key Leader Ahead of Assembly Elections
item.description: Abhishek Banerjee, nephew of Mamata Banerjee, has been named the Trinamool Congress (TMC) leader in the Lok Sabha, positioning him as the central figure to carry forward Mamata’s political legacy. Kno...

item.title: Pakistan Engaged in Diplomatic Efforts to Prevent Iran-Saudi Escalation Amid Regional Conflict
item.description: Pakistan is actively engaged in diplomatic efforts to prevent further escalation in the Middle East, particularly between Iran and Saudi Arabia, according to Adviser to the Prime Minister on Political...

item.title: A look back at Mosiuoa ‘Terror’ Lekota’s political career
item.description: Mosiuoa ‘Terror’ Lekota, who passed away at 77, was a larger-than-life figure in South African politics, known for both his bold actions and emotional depth. He earned the nickname ‘Terror’ during his...

item.title: Philippines Considers Updating Anti-Espionage Laws Amid Modern Security Threats
item.description: The Philippines is facing increasing pressure to modernize its anti-espionage laws, which defense officials describe as outdated. Security experts and former officials now serving in Congress are advo...

item.title: U.S. Congress Votes on War Powers Resolution Amid Iran Conflict
item.description: The U.S. Senate is preparing for a crucial vote on a war powers resolution following President Donald Trump's decision to engage militarily with Iran. The resolution would require congressional approv...

item.title: Three Men Arrested in UK on Suspicion of Assisting Chinese Intelligence
item.description: Three men have been detained in the United Kingdom on suspicion of assisting China’s foreign intelligence service. The arrests took place on Wednesday, with Counter Terrorism Policing London confirmin...

item.title: Seth Meyers Criticizes Trump for Revealing Military Plans in Iran Conflict
item.description: On March 4, 2026, 'Late Night' host Seth Meyers criticized President Donald Trump for publicly disclosing U.S. military plans during the ongoing conflict in Iran. Speaking about Trump’s remarks to CNN...

item.title: Changes in Federal Funding Threaten Permanent Housing Programs for Detroit’s Homeless
item.description: Detroit has seen a worsening homelessness crisis, with around 1,725 people homeless on a single night in 2024, including hundreds of families and over 2,500 children experiencing unstable housing. The...

item.title: EU backs Spain amid US trade threat, Madrid affirms sovereign stance
item.description: On 4th March 2026, the European Union (EU) publicly backed Spain after US President Donald Trump threatened to halt trade with Madrid over Spain's refusal to support Washington’s actions against Iran....

item.title: YouVersion establishes Kenya Hub to support Bible growth in Africa
item.description: YouVersion, the creator of the world’s most popular Bible app, has launched a Regional Hub in Kenya to further the growth of Bible engagement across Africa. The opening, celebrated on February 23, 202...

item.title: Trump criticises UK decision on use of bases for Iran strikes
item.description: Former US President Donald Trump has criticised Sir Keir Starmer, stating he is 'no Winston Churchill' in relation to the UK government's refusal to allow the initial use of British bases for US-Israe...

item.title: Offshore Floating Data Centers Powered by Wind Energy Could Address AI Energy Challenges
item.description: With the growing energy demands of AI data centers, some innovators have considered placing servers in space to access continuous solar power. However, a startup called Aikido is pursuing a more pract...

item.title: US and Israel escalate conflict with Iran as leadership transition underway
item.description: The conflict between the US, Israel, and Iran has intensified following coordinated airstrikes, with more than 200 Australians returning from Dubai on the first commercial flight since hostilities beg...

item.title: US directs non-essential consular staff and families to leave Karachi and Lahore amid security concerns
item.description: The US State Department has ordered all non-emergency staff and their families at US consulates in Karachi and Lahore to leave Pakistan due to rising security risks. This move comes in the backdrop of...

item.title: Ebonyi Consultant Alleges Abduction and Death Threat from Ex-Governor Umahi Over $119 Million Recovery Fee Dispute
item.description: Dr. Jackie Ikeotuonye, CEO of Andrew Bishopton Limited, don accuse former Ebonyi State Governor David Umahi (now Minister of Works) of betrayal, intimidation, and abuse of power. Her company was appoi...

item.title: Los Angeles City Council Proposes Tax Amnesty for Cannabis Businesses Owing $400 Million in Back Taxes
item.description: More than 500 of Los Angeles' approximately 700 licensed cannabis businesses collectively owe around $400 million in back taxes, penalties, and interest, with the total reaching $417 million by Decemb...
